debug_info.goal:
x : ℝ
⊢ ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..x, t * exp t = (x - 1) * exp x + 1

have h :
      (∫ t in 0..x, t * exp t)
        = ((fun t => (t - 1) * exp t) x - (fun t => (t - 1) * exp t) 0) := by
    simpa [sub_eq_add_neg] using
      (intervalIntegral.integral_mul_deriv_eq_deriv_mul
        (u := fun t : ℝ => t)
        (v := fun t : ℝ => exp t)
        (a := (0 : ℝ)) (b := x))
  simp [h, sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm, mul_add, add_mul, exp_zero]

simpa [mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm, sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc, add_left_comm,
    add_comm] using intervalIntegral.integral_mul_exp_eq (a := 0) (b := x)

have hcont : Continuous (fun t : ℝ => t * exp t) := by
    have h1 : Continuous fun t : ℝ => t := continuous_id
    have h2 : Continuous fun t : ℝ => exp t := continuous_exp
    simpa [mul_comm, mul_left_comm, mul_assoc] using h1.mul h2
  have hderiv :
      ∀ t, HasDerivAt (fun t : ℝ => (t - 1) * exp t) (t * exp t) t := by
    intro t
    have hmul :
        HasDerivAt (fun t : ℝ => (t - 1) * exp t)
          ((1 : ℝ) * exp t + (t - 1) * exp t) t := by
      simpa using ((hasDerivAt_id t).sub_const 1).mul (Real.hasDerivAt_exp t)
    simpa [mul_add, add_mul, sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm, mul_assoc] using hmul
  have :=
    intervalIntegral.integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt_of_continuousOn
      (f := fun t : ℝ => (t - 1) * exp t) (f' := fun t : ℝ => t * exp t)
      (a := (0 : ℝ)) (b := x) (fun t _ => hderiv t) hcont.continuousOn
  simpa using this.symm
